_test_metadata.purpose: Wire parser drift: checked step with whitespace-only status_reason (tests trimming bypass)
_test_metadata.expected_outcome: FAIL - must reject at wire boundary, not accept via trimming
_test_metadata.rationale: Fail-closed: checked steps cannot have status_reason field present at all, even if whitespace-only
_test_metadata.attack_description: Adversary provides whitespace-only status_reason on checked step, hoping parser will trim to empty and accept. Parser must reject presence of field regardless of content.
_test_metadata.wire_posture: No trimming at wire boundary - reject field presence for checked/unchecked
